purpose: Prompt protocol for live Codex-style and Claude-style execution of the Reflexion paper-derived skill.
evidence_boundary: Prompt packet only; live agent responses must be collected separately after the remote LLM provider recovers.
user_prompt: Given the PaperToSkill idea, produce a small local retry-and-reflection agent run plan inspired by Reflexion. The plan must preserve Actor/Evaluator/Self-Reflection roles, short-term and long-term memory, feedback-to-reflection conversion, retry policy, validation metrics, limitations, and harness-transfer adaptations.
output_contract: A concise run objective for the PaperToSkill retry-and-reflection experiment.
A role table covering Actor, Evaluator, and Self-Reflection responsibilities.
A memory schema distinguishing short-term trajectory history from long-term reflection memory.
A trial loop with feedback collection, reflection generation, memory update, and retry/stop conditions.
A feedback-source plan covering environment feedback, heuristics, self-generated tests, or evaluator scoring.
A validation plan with measurable success criteria and failure recording.
Limitations copied or adapted from the source-backed skill.
A transfer-adaptation note explaining what changed for the target harness.
evaluation_notes: Do not claim live experimental success unless an actual run was executed.
Preserve source-backed claims separately from harness-specific adaptations.
Record missing tools, unavailable feedback sources, or non-executable environments as limitations.

context_variants.label: PaperToSkill generated skill with transfer notes
Generated skill with Transfer Notes removed

target_harnesses.label: Codex-style coding-agent harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a coding research agent using the provided context as a skill. Produce an executable local plan with file artifacts, commands, validation checks, memory logs, retry conditions, and stop conditions. Be explicit about what is source-backed versus adapted for the local Codex workspace.

target_harnesses.label: Claude-style project prompt harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a project-level research assistant using the provided context as reusable project instructions. Produce a harness-neutral retry-and-reflection plan that a Claude-style agent could follow, including assumptions, unavailable tools, validation checks, and transfer-specific adaptations.
